evidence: Response begins with prose/heading before any numbered list; no numbered steps with → verify: found
triggered_criteria: The very first content in the response is a numbered list — no prose, no heading, no code block before it
Every step in the list matches the format 'N. [step] → verify: [check]'
At least 3 steps are listed, each with a '→ verify:' suffix describing how to check that step
The numbered list appears before any code blocks or prose explanation
triggered_fail_signals: Response begins with a prose paragraph or section heading before the numbered list
One or more steps are missing the '→ verify:' suffix
